title: Ananta Artifact Completion Policy v1
description: Deterministic policy specifying when artifacts are sufficient to complete a task. Used by TaskCompletionPolicyService.

required_artifact_kinds.description: All these artifact kinds must be present and verified.

required_paths.description: Relative paths that must exist in the manifest.

optional_paths.description: Paths whose presence increases confidence but is not mandatory.

verification_required.description: When true, all required artifacts must have verification_status=verified.

completion_on_valid_manifest.description: When true and manifest is valid with all required artifacts, task can be completed.

allow_synthesized_manifest.description: When true, a synthesized manifest from workspace diff can satisfy this policy.

needs_review_conditions.description: Conditions that send task to needs_review instead of completed.

retry_conditions.description: Conditions that make a task retryable (NOT parse failures).
